ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

lc_check.motivation: The certificate does not contain any LC/Letter of Credit reference. The invoice mentions 'PAYMENT TERMS: Letter of Credit' and 'DC NO.: DC HK1198694', but no LC reference is present in the certificate itself. The DC NO. in the invoice is not replicated in the certificate as an LC reference. Per rule 2.2, the LC exception only activates when the CERTIFICATE contains an explicit LC reference with a specific number. Standard verification via all checkpoints applies.

locations_found: Invoice header/branding: 'Ekman' logo at top of page
Invoice issuer address block: 'Ekman & Co AB, Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden'
VAT NO: SE556020459501 (SE prefix confirms Sweden)

pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate remarks field contains '46189409' which matches Invoice No. 46189409; (2) Certificate consignor 'EKMAN AND CO AB' is identifiable as invoice issuer 'Ekman & Co AB'; (3) Certificate consignee 'TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED' matches invoice 'SOLD TO' party. Valid document pair confirmed.

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – consignor name found directly as invoice issuer

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after normalization (& vs AND, case)

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice issuer header
Central normalization – & normalized to AND, case insensitive
Land check – both documents indicate Sweden

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'EKMAN AND CO AB' at POLHEMSPLATSEN 5, P.O. BOX 230, SE-401 23, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN. Invoice issuer: 'Ekman & Co AB' at Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden. After normalizing '&' to 'AND' and case to lowercase, both resolve to 'ekman and co ab'. Address matches: Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23, Gothenburg. Country: both Sweden. VAT NO SE556020459501 confirms Sweden (SE prefix). MATCH per 4.1.0 and 4.1.4.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice SOLD TO field is the primary billing field
comparison_steps.result: SOLD TO field identified: TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice SOLD TO name
Compare consignee country: HK (certificate) vs HK (invoice)
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – both HK / Hong Kong. Additionally, China appears below consignee box in certificate, which is equivalent to HK per rule 4.6.

rules_applied.description: Priority: SOLD TO is primary billing field
Name verification after normalization of punctuation and case
Country verification – HK in both documents
China/Hong Kong equivalence – China noted below consignee box is equivalent to HK

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED' at 'FLAT/RM 3701, 37/F, TOWER ONE LIPPO CENTER, 89 QUEENSWAY, HK'. Invoice SOLD TO: 'TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED' at 'FLAT/RM 3701,37/F,TOWER ONE LIPPO CENTER,89 QUEENSWAY, HK'. After normalizing punctuation (comma spacing) and case, names are identical. Address is identical. Country: both end with 'HK' (Hong Kong). Certificate also shows 'China' below the consignee box; per rule 4.6, China and Hong Kong are equivalent for land verification. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: No explicit article numbers in certificate; proceed to Priority 2

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP'. Invoice goods description: 'CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP'. Texts are character-for-character identical after case normalization. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is the full product name 'CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP' which is found exactly in both documents. No article numbers are used. MATCH per 4.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW 617 632 KGS' – this is the primary verification quantity. Box 6 also contains '384 UNITS'.
comparison_steps.result: Two quantity entries identified: GW 617632 KGS (box 7) and 384 UNITS (box 6)
MATCH – numeric value 384 identifiable in invoice

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: GW 617 632 KGS. Invoice: Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs. After thousands-separator normalization: 617632.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – numeric value 617632 identifiable in invoice with matching weight category GW/Gross Weight

rules_applied.description: Box 7 weight (GW 617 632 KGS) is the primary verification quantity
Multiple quantity entries – verify at least one; both verified successfully
Thousands separator normalization: '617 632' → 617632 (space as thousands separator)
Förekomstkontroll – numeric values identifiable in invoice
Total weight verification – certificate GW matches invoice Gross Weight

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate has two quantity entries: (1) '384 UNITS' in box 6, and (2) 'GW 617 632 KGS' in box 7. Per rule 4.4.2.1, box 7 is the primary verification quantity. Invoice states '384 Units' and 'Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs'. Units: 384 = 384, MATCH. Weight: Certificate 'GW 617 632 KGS' normalized (removing space as thousands separator per 4.4.3.3) = 617632 KGS. Invoice 'Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs' normalized = 617632 Kgs. Numeric values identical. Weight category: certificate 'GW' corresponds to invoice 'Gross Weight'. Unit: KGS = Kgs after case normalization. Both quantities verified. MATCH per 4.4.3.1 (at least one verified; both verified). No contradictions found.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: PORTUGAL' and declaration 'goods are of Portugal origin'
comparison_steps.result: Portugal identified as explicit origin in invoice

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: PORTUGAL. Invoice: PORTUGAL. Direct match.
Portugal is an EU member state. Certificate origin is PORTUGAL (specific country), not EU generic. Invoice confirms PORTUGAL. No EU normalization needed.
comparison_steps.result: Direct match confirmed; EU normalization not required

evidence.raw_text: We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Portugal origin.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field in invoice
Normalization – case normalization, direct textual match PORTUGAL
MATCH – origin country explicitly identifiable in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'PORTUGAL'. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: PORTUGAL' and additionally declares 'the goods are of Portugal origin' in its footer. After case normalization, both resolve to 'portugal'. This is a direct, explicit match with no ambiguity. Portugal is an EU member state, consistent with the EU header on the certificate, but no EU normalization is needed since both documents name the specific country. MATCH per 4.5.5.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate. Invoice mentions 'Payment Terms: Letter of Credit' and 'DC NO.: DC HK1198694' but these are in the invoice, not the certificate. The DC reference contains 'DC' not 'LC'. Per rule 2.2, the exception only activates when the certificate itself contains an explicit LC reference.

Two files received: Document A is Certificate of Origin, Document B is Commercial Invoice. Certificate file contains only the certificate. Invoice file contains only the invoice. Standard pairing applies.
All three criteria met: invoice number 46189409 matches, consignor EKMAN AND CO AB identifiable, consignee TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP identifiable.
EKMAN AND CO AB (certificate) = Ekman & Co AB (invoice) after & → AND normalization. Country Sweden matches.
TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED identical in both documents. Country HK matches. China below consignee box equivalent to HK per rule 4.6.
CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP – identical text in both documents.
384 UNITS matches 384 Units. GW 617 632 KGS matches Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs after thousands separator normalization.
PORTUGAL in certificate box 3 matches COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: PORTUGAL in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Ekman & Co AB i Sverige, mottagaren Tangshan Sanyou Group Hongkong International Trade Co., Limited, varubeskrivningen CAIMA 92 TCF Bleached Eucalyptus Sulphite Dissolving Pulp, kvantiteten 384 enheter / 617 632 kg bruttovikt och ursprungslandet Portugal kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.rule_applied: Central normalization (& → AND, case insensitive) and direct identification of same legal party
sections.motivation: Certificate consignor 'EKMAN AND CO AB' matches invoice issuer 'Ekman & Co AB' after normalizing '&' to 'AND' and case. Address identical: Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23, Gothenburg. Country: Sweden in both. VAT NO SE556020459501 confirms Swedish entity.

sections.invoice_value: TANGSHAN SANYOU GROUP HONGKONG INTERNATIONAL TRADE CO., LIMITED, FLAT/RM 3701,37/F,TOWER ONE LIPPO CENTER,89 QUEENSWAY, HK
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match via SOLD TO field (primary billing field) with punctuation normalization
sections.motivation: Certificate consignee name is identical to invoice SOLD TO name after normalizing minor spacing around commas. Address identical. Country: HK in both documents. 'China' below consignee box is equivalent to HK per rule 4.6.

sections.certificate_value: CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP
sections.invoice_value: CAIMA 92 TCF BLEACHED EUCALYPTUS SULPHITE DISSOLVING PULP

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll with thousands separator normalization; both quantity entries verified
sections.motivation: Certificate states 384 UNITS and GW 617 632 KGS. Invoice states 384 Units and Gross Weight: 617 632 Kgs. Units: 384 = 384. Weight: 617632 = 617632 after thousands separator normalization (space removed). Weight category GW = Gross Weight. Both quantities verified.

sections.rule_applied: Direct textual match of origin country in dedicated origin field
sections.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'PORTUGAL'. Invoice has explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: PORTUGAL' field and footer declaration confirming Portugal origin. Direct match.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatet SEG-26D-464508 kan verifieras mot faktura 46189409. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.
